title: androcorys monophylla
intro: Androcorys monophylla is a species of orchid, more specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Androcorys monophylla are said to include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
